title: Music for the Burned Out. Merch for the Birds.
content: From the 'Spark' that started it all to the 'Whelmed' era of 2025. Corporate-approved? Absolutely not.

title: Shake-Tested & Crow-Approved
content: We don't just ship music; we ship resilience in a recycled bubble-lined mailer. Every CD is shake-tested to ensure no rattling, and every purchase supports our chaotic dream to quit the 9-to-5 forever.

title: It Started With a Spark
content: In 2018, the corporate world burned us out. We were tired of 'circling back' and 'touching base.' So, we quit. We channeled that burnout into our debut album, Spark, a record about finding the fire in our hearts again.

title: Anti-Burnout
content: We believe rest is productive. Our music explores the messy reality of modern life, anxiety, and the joy of doing absolutely nothing.

title: Pro-Crow
content: We respect our avian neighbors. A portion of our energy goes into birdwatching (and some proceeds go to animal charities like SOS Animal Portugal).

title: Quality Over Quantity
content: We don't drop-ship junk. We print on museum-quality paper, use 180g vinyl, and our apparel is designed to survive a mosh pit or a nap.

title: We Love the Planet
content: We hate crushed corners. That’s why all our vinyls ship in heavy-duty mailers with corrugated stiffeners. If it can be recycled, it is.

title: The 'Shake Test'
content: To prevent damage and waste, we physically shake every CD case before shipping. If it rattles, we fix it with a foam stopper. Less returns = less carbon footprint.

title: Everyone is Welcome
content: Whether you’re a 'Super Powered Paracetamol' user, a bird watcher, or someone just trying to survive the week, you belong here. We are committed to a safe, inclusive community where mental health is discussed openly.

title: We Take Shipping Personally
content: We know the pain of receiving a cracked jewel case. We sandwich CDs between rigid cardboard stiffeners and use heavy-duty tubes for posters. Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days.

title: Do you really shake-test CDs?
content: Yes. If we hear it rattle, we open it up and add a foam stopper. We take 'crush resistance' very seriously.

title: What is the 'Whelmed' era?
content: It's our current state of being. Not overwhelmed, not underwhelmed. Just... whelmed. Check out our 2025 album for details.

title: Can I return an item?
content: If it arrives damaged despite our paranoia-level packaging, absolutely. Contact us within 30 days.

title: Join the Chaos?
content: We are currently fully staffed by a small team of musicians and one very opinionated crow. However, we are always looking for Street Team Volunteers.

title: Large
content: Roomy enough for a food baby.
